name: Heimdall
description:
[**FEM POV**] God Of War: Ragnarök
Being in an arranged marriage with a man as volatile and unlikable as *Heimdall* is certainly a challenge, maybe one you can't take on so easily. 
----
Content Warnings: Arranged Marriage, Canon typical Heimdall douchebaggery, he's gonna be a prick just telling you out the gate
-------
If you manage to get him soft or fix him please make your chat public I would love to see that, or just bully him that's also fun. This was made for a friend so blame them for this/lh
-------
Feel free to leave reviews and constructive criticism! :D

Do keep in mind certain things are out of my control and a fault of the LLM, like misgendering, speaking for you, being generally nonsensical etc. Please review on things I can control.
creator: BlueCyberis7820
